testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_355] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_63] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_290] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_288] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_289] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_287] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_286] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
[NONE][CKV_AWS_237] Ensure Create before destroy for API Gateway
[NONE][CKV_AWS_76] Ensure API Gateway has Access Logging enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_73] Ensure API Gateway has X-Ray Tracing enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_120] Ensure API Gateway caching is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_342] Ensure WAF rule has any actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_192] Ensure WAF prevents message lookup in Log4j2. See CVE-2021-44228 aka log4jshell
[NONE][CKV_AWS_175] Ensure WAF has associated rules
[NONE][CKV_AWS_276] Ensure Data Trace is not enabled in API Gateway Method Settings
[NONE][CKV_AWS_225] Ensure API Gateway method setting caching is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_308] Ensure API Gateway method setting caching is set to encrypted
[NONE][CKV_AWS_217] Ensure Create before destroy for API deployments
[NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_66] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year
[NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_66] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year
[NONE][CKV_AWS_59] Ensure there is no open access to back-end resources through API
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_70] Ensure API gateway method has authorization or API key set
[NONE][CKV_AWS_364] Ensure that AWS Lambda function permissions delegated to AWS services are limited by SourceArn or SourceAccount
[NONE][CKV_AWS_301] Ensure that AWS Lambda function is not publicly accessible
[NONE][CKV_AWS_59] Ensure there is no open access to back-end resources through API

[NONE][CKV_AWS_27] Ensure all data stored in the SQS queue is encrypted
[NONE][CKV_AWS_168] Ensure SQS queue policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_27] Ensure all data stored in the SQS queue is encrypted

[NONE][CKV_AWS_117] Ensure that AWS Lambda function is configured inside a VPC
[NONE][CKV_AWS_115] Ensure that AWS Lambda function is configured for function-level concurrent execution limit
[NONE][CKV_AWS_116] Ensure that AWS Lambda function is configured for a Dead Letter Queue(DLQ)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_50] X-Ray tracing is enabled for Lambda
[NONE][CKV_AWS_173] Check encryption settings for Lambda environmental variable
[NONE][CKV_AWS_45] Ensure no hard-coded secrets exist in lambda environment
[NONE][CKV_AWS_363] Ensure Lambda Runtime is not deprecated
[NONE][CKV_AWS_272] Ensure AWS Lambda function is configured to validate code-signing
[NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_66] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

[NONE][CKV_AWS_285] Ensure State Machine has execution history logging enabled

[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

[NONE][CKV_AWS_174] Verify CloudFront Distribution Viewer Certificate is using TLS v1.2 or higher

skipped.message: con dominio personalizado el viewer_certificate usa TLSv1.2_2021; en modo lab (cloudfront_default_certificate) AWS fuerza TLSv1 y no permite subir minimum_protocol_version.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_62] Ensure S3 buckets should have event notifications enabled

skipped.message: Sumidero de access logs; no requiere notificaciones de eventos.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_144] Ensure that S3 bucket has cross-region replication enabled

skipped.message: Bucket de logs de la región DR; no necesita re-replicarse.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_47] Ensure AWS CloudFront attached WAFv2 WebACL is configured with AMR for Log4j Vulnerability

skipped.message: aws_wafv2_web_acl.main (security_waf.tf) incluye AWSManagedRulesKnownBadInputsRuleSet con override_action=none; Checkov no resuelve la referencia cross-file.
